description: Engineered Day5 rerank acceptance cases; not a statistical evaluation.

cases.query: LangGraph thread_id 如何用于 checkpoint 状态隔离？

texts.thread-id-exact: thread_id identifies the checkpoint state namespace for each LangGraph thread.
texts.checkpoint-overview: Checkpointing persists graph state between executions.
texts.thread-pool: A thread pool controls concurrent worker execution.
texts.state-schema: State schemas define graph channel values.
texts.memory-guide: Long-term memory stores user facts across sessions.

cases.query: Chroma similarity_search 的 top_k 在哪里生效？

texts.similarity-api: similarity_search receives top_k and forwards it to the Chroma vector query.
texts.semantic-intro: Semantic search retrieves conceptually related passages.
texts.top-k-metric: Recall@K measures relevant items in the first K results.
texts.vector-index: A vector index accelerates nearest-neighbor lookup.
texts.distance-note: Cosine distance is converted to a similarity score.

cases.query: RRF 的 k=60 如何影响 fused_score？

texts.rrf-formula: RRF computes fused_score as the sum of 1 divided by k plus one-based rank, commonly with k=60.
texts.fusion-overview: Rank fusion combines multiple retrieval lists.
texts.score-scale: Dense and BM25 raw scores use different scales.
texts.ranking-metric: MRR uses the reciprocal rank of the first relevant item.
texts.random-forest: Random forests combine decision trees and are sometimes abbreviated RF.

cases.query: BAAI/bge-reranker-v2-m3 在流水线哪个阶段运行？

texts.reranker-stage: BAAI/bge-reranker-v2-m3 runs after RRF fusion and before ContextBuilder.
texts.model-config: Model names are supplied through environment configuration.
texts.cross-encoder: A cross-encoder jointly scores a query and candidate.

texts.langfuse-config: LANGFUSE_BASE_URL selects the Langfuse Cloud region or self-hosted ingestion endpoint.
texts.otel-export: OpenTelemetry exporters send spans in batches.
texts.service-url: A base URL identifies an HTTP service root.

cases.query: context_sources 如何保证 [S1] 引用与 chunk 对齐？

texts.source-mapping: ContextBuilder creates context_sources and citation IDs from the exact included chunk order.
texts.citation-style: Answers use numbered source markers such as S1.
texts.context-budget: Context length is bounded by a character budget.
texts.chunk-schema: Chunk metadata contains source, page, and section fields.
texts.metadata-guide: Metadata should remain stable across retrieval stages.
